title: Vance, Witkoff, Kushner heading to Pakistan tonight for second round talks
snippet: VP JD Vance will lead the US delegation traveling to Pakistan tonight (Monday) for second round of Iran negotiations. Same team as first round: Vance, Witkoff, Kushner. Formal negotiations scheduled to begin Tuesday April 22. Delegations arriving over the weekend/Monday night.
tag_reason: 신규 — 밴스의 이슬라마바드 출발 확정은 4/19까지 혼란이었으나 4/20에 해소됨. 화요일 협상 개시 일정 확정.
